arts.ttl: No Puertas, no Amoura and no Nilsson: How Union St Gilloise’s summer transfer business has seen the goals dry up for former West Brom and Brighton defender turned head coach
arts.sum: Last season, Union St Gilloise were challenging for the title, and they were doing it in style. They may have missed out despite leading the league for most of the…

arts.ttl: Preview: Oxford United vs. West Bromwich Albion - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Saturday's Championship clash between Oxford United and West Bromwich Albion, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.

arts.ttl: Liam Payne's boyhood football club West Brom pay tribute to tragic star
arts.sum: Tributes have been pouring in for the former One Direction star Liam Payne, aged 31, who tragically died after a fall from a hotel balcony in Argentina. West Bromwich Albion, the team Payne passionately supported have expressed their condolences following the devastating incident.
